transcript: Speaker A: काय करतेस? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: I sleeping. Speaker A: "I am sleeping" असं म्हणायचं. आणि थोडं formal म्हणायचं असेल तर "I am getting some sleep" असंही म्हणू शकतेस. [Say "I am sleeping". And if you want to say it a bit formally, you can also say "I am getting some sleep".] Speaker B: अरे हो, पण English कसं शिकायचं? [Oh yes, but how to learn English?] Speaker A: माझ्यासोबत दररोज फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस केलीस तर फक्त एका महिन्यात तू confidently English बोलू शकतेस. [If you practice with me for just 15 minutes every day, you can speak English confidently in just one month.] Speaker B: पण ते महाग असेल ना? [But it must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: अजिबात नाही. फक्त १ रुपयात तू हा ॲप पूर्ण ट्राय करून पाहू शकतेस. १ कोटीपेक्षा जास्त लोक माझ्यासोबत English शिकत आहेत. [Not at all. You can try this app fully for just 1 rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning English with me.] Speaker B: Wow, मग कसं join करू? [Wow, then how do I join?] Speaker A: आताच MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड कर आणि English शिकायला सुरुवात कर. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: काय करतेस [What are you doing] | I sleeping | I am sleeping | असं म्हणायचं [Say like this] | आणि थोडं formal [And a bit formal] | तर "I am getting some sleep" असंही म्हणू शकतेस [then you can also say "I am getting some sleep"] | अरे हो [Oh yes] | पण English कसं शिकायचं? [But how to learn English?] | माझ्यासोबत दररोज [With me daily] | फक्त 15 मिनिटं [Just 15 minutes] | 10-15 MINUTES | प्रॅक्टिस केलीस [If you practice] | तर [then] | फक्त एका महिन्यात [just in one month] | तू confidently [you confidently] | English बोलू शकतेस [can speak English] | पण ते महाग असेल ना [But it must be expensive, right] | अजिबात नाही [Not at all] | MySivi Premium | LIMITED TIME OFFER | ₹1 | Autopay, cancel anytime. | 1,200 learners purchased today | 24/7 AI English Teacher | 500+ Exercises and Lessons | Unlimited Access | फक्त १ रुपयात [For just 1 rupee] | तू हा ॲप पूर्ण [you this app fully] | ट्राय करून पाहू शकतेस [can try out] | १ कोटीपेक्षा जास्त [More than 1 crore] | लोक माझ्यासोबत [people with me] | English शिकत आहेत [are learning English] | Wow | मग कसं join करू? [Then how to join?] | आताच माय सिवी [Right now My Sivi] | ॲप डाऊनलोड कर [download app] | आणि [and] | English शिकायला [to learn English] | सुरुवात कर [start]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a Marathi-speaking woman's English grammar in a split-screen format. The avatar explains how practicing 15 minutes daily on the MySivi app can build confidence within a month. It promotes a 1-rupee trial offer and urges viewers to download the app.
